expected_properties: When data_en is asserted for fewer than 3 clk_b cycles, dataout should not update to the new data_in value.
additional_cases.goal: Confirm that insufficient enable duration does not cause premature dataout update.
notes: Spec requires data_en high for at least 3 clk_b cycles before synchronization; this case checks the violation.
stimulus_intent: Assert data_en for 1 clk_b cycle while providing a new data_in value, then deassert.
timing_assumptions: Monitor dataout for at least 6 clk_b cycles after deassertion; expect no change.

expected_properties: Dataout should eventually reflect data_in after data_en is high for >=3 clk_b cycles, within a conservative observation window.
additional_cases.goal: Validate cross-domain synchronization timing without assuming exact latency.
notes: Observes that dataout may change after variable latency due to unknown pipeline depth.
stimulus_intent: Drive data_in to a new value, assert data_en for 3 clk_b cycles, then deassert; keep data_in stable.
timing_assumptions: Allow up to 8 clk_b cycles after deassertion of data_en to see dataout update.

expected_properties: Two successive valid enable sequences should each result in dataout updating to the respective data_in values, without interference.
additional_cases.goal: Check that back-to-back synchronizations work correctly under conservative timing.
notes: Ensures pipeline registers clear between operations.
stimulus_intent: Perform first enable sequence with data_in = 0xA, then after completion start second enable sequence with data_in = 0x5.
timing_assumptions: Observe each update within separate windows of up to 8 clk_b cycles.

expected_properties: Dataout eventually reflects the value of data_in after data_en has been high for at least 3 clk_b cycles.
No premature update of dataout occurs before the required enable duration.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate functional data transfer across the two clock domains under conservative timing.
notes: Observes that data_en must stay asserted for a minimum of three clk_b cycles as specified.
Data_in is assumed to remain stable during the enable window.
stimulus_intent: Drive data_in to a known pattern, assert data_en for >=3 clk_b cycles while keeping data_in stable, then deassert and monitor dataout.
timing_assumptions: Allow observation of dataout for up to 8 clk_b cycles after deassertion of data_en; do not assume a fixed latency.
